final:
// // This module performs subtraction when ctrl is HIGH and addition when ctrl is LOW
module top_module(
    input [3:0] A,
    input [3:0] B,
    input ctrl,
    output reg [3:0] Y
);always @(*) begin
        if (ctrl) begin
            Y <= A + B;
        end else begin
            Y <= A - B;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module performs subtraction when ctrl is HIGH and addition when ctrl is LOW
